display.purpose: Homepage hero headline only. Geist Mono 600, ls floor -0.04em.

body.purpose: All running text; prose at 0.95rem/lh1.85, column capped 50rem.

label.purpose: Uppercase field keys, captions, chips, table headers.

quote.purpose: Fraunces italic — ledes, blockquotes, the footer motto. Rare.

shadows.name: phosphor-bloom-dot
shadows.purpose: Glow on living status indicators (host dot, heartbeat) only.

shadows.name: phosphor-bloom-text
shadows.purpose: Text glow on the footer ASCII signature / hero CRT moments.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: The system's only easing curve for all state transitions and entrances.

components.name: Primary Command Button
components.description: Filled command button; inverts to solid phosphor on hover. Used for the main action.
components.css: .ds-cmd { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.55rem; padding: 0.7rem 1.1rem; font-family: var(--font-mono, 'JetBrains Mono', monospace); font-size: 0.82rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--color-bone, #e6e1cf); background: var(--color-pane, #0f1413); border: 1px solid var(--color-rule-hi, #2a3230); text-transform: lowercase; letter-spacing: 0.02em; text-decoration: none; transition: all 120ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-cmd::before { content: '$'; color: var(--color-phosphor, #7ee787); font-weight: 600; } .ds-cmd:hover { color: var(--color-void, #07090a); background: var(--color-phosphor, #7ee787); border-color: var(--color-phosphor, #7ee787); } .ds-cmd:hover::before { color: var(--color-void, #07090a); } .ds-cmd:focus-visible { outline: 1px solid var(--color-phosphor, #7ee787); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Command Button
components.description: Transparent default-action button; text/border/glyph turn phosphor on hover.
components.css: .ds-cmd-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.55rem; padding: 0.7rem 1.1rem; font-family: var(--font-mono, 'JetBrains Mono', monospace); font-size: 0.82rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--color-bone, #e6e1cf); background: transparent; border: 1px solid var(--color-rule-hi, #2a3230); text-transform: lowercase; letter-spacing: 0.02em; text-decoration: none; transition: all 120ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-cmd-ghost::before { content: '$'; color: var(--color-phosphor, #7ee787); font-weight: 600; } .ds-cmd-ghost:hover { color: var(--color-phosphor, #7ee787); border-color: var(--color-phosphor, #7ee787); } .ds-cmd-ghost:hover::before { color: var(--color-phosphor, #7ee787); }

components.name: Rose Contact Button
components.description: The rare strong/contact CTA; rose glyph and hover fill.
components.css: .ds-cmd-rose { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.55rem; padding: 0.7rem 1.1rem; font-family: var(--font-mono, 'JetBrains Mono', monospace); font-size: 0.82rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--color-bone, #e6e1cf); background: var(--color-pane, #0f1413); border: 1px solid var(--color-rule-hi, #2a3230); text-transform: lowercase; letter-spacing: 0.02em; text-decoration: none; transition: all 120ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-cmd-rose::before { content: '$'; color: var(--color-rose, #ff5c7c); font-weight: 600; } .ds-cmd-rose:hover { color: var(--color-void, #07090a); background: var(--color-rose, #ff5c7c); border-color: var(--color-rose, #ff5c7c); } .ds-cmd-rose:hover::before { color: var(--color-void, #07090a); }

components.name: Chip / Tag
components.description: Outlined uppercase tag; phosphor variant for emphasis. Zero radius.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.4em; padding: 0.15rem 0.55rem; border: 1px solid var(--color-rule-hi, #2a3230); color: var(--color-ash, #a6a195); font-family: var(--font-mono, 'JetBrains Mono', monospace); font-size: 0.7rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; line-height: 1.6; } .ds-chip-phosphor { border-color: var(--color-phosphor, #7ee787); color: var(--color-phosphor, #7ee787); }

components.name: Nav Command Link
components.description: Header nav shaped as [key] label; whole link turns phosphor on hover/active, active appends a square marker.
components.html: [posts]blog
components.css: .ds-nav { display: inline-flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 0.35rem; padding: 0.35rem 0.65rem; color: var(--color-ash, #a6a195); font-family: var(--font-mono, 'JetBrains Mono', monospace); font-size: 0.78rem; text-decoration: none; transition: color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-nav .b { color: var(--color-faint, #3a3d38); } .ds-nav .k { color: var(--color-amber, #f4c171); font-weight: 500; } .ds-nav .l { text-transform: lowercase; } .ds-nav:hover, .ds-nav.is-active { color: var(--color-phosphor, #7ee787); } .ds-nav:hover .b, .ds-nav:hover .k, .ds-nav.is-active .b, .ds-nav.is-active .k { color: var(--color-phosphor, #7ee787); } .ds-nav.is-active::after { content: ''; width: 6px; height: 6px; background: var(--color-phosphor, #7ee787); margin-left: 0.2rem; align-self: center; }

components.name: Keycap
components.description: Physical-feeling keycap with a 2px bottom edge; also the EN/ZH language switch.
components.css: .ds-kbd { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-width: 1.6rem; height: 1.6rem; padding: 0 0.4rem; font-family: var(--font-mono, 'JetBrains Mono', monospace); font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--color-bone, #e6e1cf); background: var(--color-pane, #0f1413); border: 1px solid var(--color-rule-hi, #2a3230); border-bottom-width: 2px; line-height: 1; transition: all 120ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-kbd:hover { color: var(--color-phosphor, #7ee787); border-color: var(--color-phosphor, #7ee787); }

components.name: Stack Card
components.description: Flat zero-radius panel; border shifts to phosphor and fill tints green on hover. No shadow.
components.html:
[00]

frameworks

  • ▸ React
  • ▸ Astro
components.css: .ds-card { padding: 1.25rem; border: 1px solid var(--color-rule, #1a1f1d); background: var(--color-pane, #0f1413); transition: all 220ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-card:hover { border-color: var(--color-phosphor, #7ee787); background: color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-pane, #0f1413) 80%, var(--color-phosphor, #7ee787) 4%); } .ds-card-head { display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 0.5rem; padding-bottom: 0.6rem; border-bottom: 1px dashed var(--color-rule, #1a1f1d); margin-bottom: 0.85rem; } .ds-card-num { color: var(--color-phosphor, #7ee787); font-family: var(--font-display, 'Geist Mono', monospace); font-size: 0.78rem; } .ds-card-title { font-family: var(--font-display, 'Geist Mono', monospace); font-size: 1rem; margin: 0; text-transform: lowercase; color: var(--color-bone, #e6e1cf); } .ds-card-list { list-style: none; padding: 0; margin: 0; display: grid; gap: 0.35rem; font-size: 0.85rem; font-family: var(--font-mono, 'JetBrains Mono', monospace); color: var(--color-ash, #a6a195); } .ds-bullet { color: var(--color-faint, #3a3d38); }

components.name: ASCII Frame
components.description: Signature box-drawing panel; top-left label straddles the border like a tmux pane title.
components.css: .ds-frame { position: relative; border: 1px solid var(--color-rule-hi, #2a3230); background: var(--color-pane, #0f1413); padding: 1.5rem; } .ds-frame::before { content: '\250C\2500 ' attr(data-label) ' \2500'; position: absolute; top: -0.55em; left: 0.75rem; background: var(--color-shell, #0a0e0d); padding: 0 0.35rem; color: var(--color-phosphor, #7ee787); font-family: var(--font-mono, 'JetBrains Mono', monospace); font-size: 0.75rem; line-height: 1; } .ds-frame-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 4.5rem 1fr; gap: 0.75rem; padding: 0.4rem 0; align-items: baseline; } .ds-frame-key { color: var(--color-amber, #f4c171); font-size: 0.72rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; } .ds-frame-val { color: var(--color-bone, #e6e1cf); font-family: var(--font-mono, 'JetBrains Mono', monospace); }

narrative.overview: The screen you'd find a frontend engineer in front of at 3am: a dark room lit only by the soft green glow of a phosphor display, a clock still ticking, a cursor still blinking. The whole interface is one long, focused terminal session — calm, precise, at home in the command line. Depth comes from three near-black tones layered like the inside of a CRT (void > shell > pane), a faint scanline haze, a vignette, and the occasional phosphor bloom — never drop-shadows. Command-line metaphors are the real grammar of the IA, not decoration: the hero boots like a shell, recent posts are a git log, the skill stack is ls ./tools, an article is a less reader. Monospace almost everywhere, with one italic serif (Fraunces) as the single warm human voice cutting through the grid.
keyCharacteristics: Dark phosphor-CRT surface; depth via tonal layering, not shadows.
Monospace-first type with one italic-serif accent voice.
Sharp, zero-radius geometry — drawn with rules and box characters, not rounded cards.
One green accent used sparingly; amber and rose are rare, role-specific signals.
Command-line metaphors as real IA, plus subtle living detail (blinking cursor, pulsing dot, live clock, read-progress).

rules.name: The One Green Rule
rules.body: Phosphor green is the system's only interactive color and stays under ~10% of any screen — links, prompts, active/hover/focus only. Rarity is the signal.

rules.name: The Dim Floor Rule
rules.body: dim (#6b6e66) is ~3.75:1 on shell — below AA 4.5:1. Permitted only for large text and non-essential decoration; reading-size body and essential labels must be ash or bone.

rules.name: The Monospace-Default Rule
rules.body: Mono is the page's native tongue; everything is mono unless it's a deliberate Fraunces accent. Never add a third family.

rules.name: The Serif-as-Spice Rule
rules.body: Fraunces appears italic, small, and rare — a lede, a quote, a motto. More than a sentence or two per view turns it into noise.

rules.name: The No-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Surfaces never cast shadows. To raise something, step up a tone (shell to pane) or add a rule-hi border. The only legal glow is phosphor light on a living element.

dos: Do keep phosphor green (#7ee787) as the single interactive accent, under ~10% of any screen.
Do convey depth with tonal layering (void/shell/pane) and 1px rule hairlines; the only legal lift is phosphor glow on a living element.
Do keep every corner sharp (radius 0); the 999px pill is reserved for status dots only.
Do keep body and essential labels at ash (#a6a195) or bone; treat WCAG AA as the floor.
Do make the command-line metaphor load-bearing — real IA, not a decorative skin.
Do use mono everywhere by default, with italic Fraunces as a rare warm accent voice.
Do give every entrance/blink/pulse a prefers-reduced-motion fallback, with content visible without the animation.
donts: Don't ship the template portfolio: gradient hero + equal-sized card grid + big avatar + 'Hi, I'm…'.
Don't fall back to corporate-blue / minimal-SaaS — no safe blue, no personality-less rounded cards.
Don't add showy parallax/bounce/neon/full-screen motion that fights readability, or wear the terminal look as a costume over a generic layout.
Don't drop reading-size body text to dim (#6b6e66, ~3.75:1) for elegance.
Don't use border-left/border-right > 1px as a colored accent stripe.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text), decorative glassmorphism beyond the one nav blur, or grey drop-shadows.
Don't introduce a third type family or let Fraunces serif spread past a sentence or two per view.
